PublicRemarks: {Agents SEE Remarks} ** TWO-YEAR TERM: $2,500 ** 18 MONTH MINIMUM TERM: $2,550 **   How would you like coming home to a tucked away adobe where you can disappear from the daily chaos?   SET BACK.  SECLUDED.   SERENE.   Welcome to this beautifully maintained modular home — a true cream puff — complete with an impressive oversized detached garage ready to accommodate hobbies, storage, a workshop, or whatever you envision.    This is a seriously adorable modern, freshly detailed TWO BEDROOM,  TWO FULL BATH modular offering convenient ONE FLOOR living.  Impressive DETACHED OVER-SIZED ONE-CAR GARAGE  is equipped with electric, side entrance,  additional section  ideal for man-cave, and full set of stairs to storage loft above (no heat in garage -space heater needed).  This space will surely satisfy the car enthusiast all  while providing an enjoyable hide-away! HOME + GARAGE TO BE RENTED TOGETHER , NO EXCEPTIONS. Property sits far back from the road, offering spacious front, side, and rear grounds (don’t worry- owner maintains the grounds).  You enter into an open living room accented with wide-plank laminate flooring and crown molding. Impressive granite kitchen with breakfast bar,  ample cabinets, range, microwave, dishwasher, and refrigerator.  FULL SIZE WASHER and DRYER are located right off the kitchen before rear yard egress.  Bedrooms are on opposite ends of the floor plan.  Off the kitchen is the MASTER BEDROOM SUITE with open and airy MASTER BATH highlighted with w/skylight and separate toilet room.  Far opposite side beyond living rm you will find brand new Hall Bath (shower only), and really ROOMY BEDROOM #2.  Both bedrooms are carpeted and have good closet space. Neutral-toned and lots of nice trendy fixtures throughout.   Home offers oil heat, propane gas for cooking, central air, well water (tested per PWTA) with new purification system,  newer septic (county certified).  Tenant is responsible for electric, filling the oil & propane tanks, cable/internet/wi-fi, and septic clean-out during the rental term.  .  APPLICANT  REQUIREMENTS-  verifiable income (pay-stubs, W-2/1099), positive rental record  (if any), no evictions, minimum credit score of  700, and current state issued photo id.  Renters Insurance is  a must-have.  Just a few short blocks to downtown Main Street featuring the renowned Grand Theater, 13th Child Brewery,  and so much more revitalization underway! Minutes to public transportation and multitudes of shopping centers on the Black Horse Pike & Cross Keys Berlin Road.  Easy access to 322, 42,  & AC Expressway.  Landlord takes utmost pride in the property and seeks tenant(s) who will treat it with equal respect.  Pets are not preferred so please do not ask. Reasonable accommodations will be made for service animals as required by law.

PublicRemarks: Stroll down this manicured street in this quiet neighborhood and you realize this is not a development...this is truly a neighborhood. Ideally located in this picturesque community is a house ready to move into and call home. The kitchen is graced with an abundance of white cabinets, granite counters with a granite backsplash and stainless-steel appliances.  Keep the cook company at the center island. Sliding glass doors lead to the paver patio. Relax in the family room while meals are being prepared in the sunny kitchen. On chilly nights curl up in front of the cozy gas fireplace with a glass of wine and enjoy the good life. Directly off the family room is a built-in media niche. The living room and dining room are open to each other, creating the perfect layout to host sit down dinner parties and holiday meals. The owner’s retreat includes a spacious bedroom graced with a walk-in closet, a double closet and a private full bath with a large custom shower stall. The additional bedrooms are spacious and offer roomy closets (two of the bedrooms have walk-in closets!). One of my favorite features is the second-floor game room!  The finished basement adds more space to this awesome home! If you need space for the kids…a man cave…a place to entertain…here it is! There is even a beautiful full bathroom in the basement. Let’s check out the backyard. The yard is fenced in providing a safe place for the kids to play while you barbeque with friends and family on the incredible raised paver patio. Relax and keep warm sitting around the built-in firepit….this truly is the good life!  You are just moments away from downtown historic Swedesboro where you can spend time exploring the restaurants and shops! This area has so much to offer! The park system offers activities when the weather is warm. There are several local wineries and breweries…farm stands and so much more! Browse the shops and antique stores in nearby Mullica Hill. There is NO homeowners association fees. Enjoy an easy commute to Philadelphia, Delaware and Cherry Hill. Oh yeah…did I mention that school system is excellent?!
